title: Magic Watch grants one battle reroll

card.rawText: The equipped creature may re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.

effect.value: May re-roll Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle

plan.title: Magic Watch grants one battle reroll
plan.summary: Verify equipped creature has permission to reroll either Hit Dice or Atk Dice once per battle.

notes: Pre-place Magic Watch on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
The equipped creature may re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.

steps: Keep Magic Watch equipped during battle.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: The equipped creature may re-roll either their Hit Dice Roll or Atk Dice Roll once per battle.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing or incomplete runtime support for this rules text.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_078_magic_watch-078-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
